\tzpentry{ID4294}{Quantum Density}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4294 introduces Quantum Density as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\partial_t \rho = -\frac{i}{\hbar} [H_{eff}(\beta), \rho] + \mathcal{L}_{dissipation}$
\]
